name: Vehicle Stunt Mayhem
description: Vehicle Stunt Mayhem is an adrenaline-charged driving game where players perform insane stunts, defy gravity, and conquer wild obstacle courses. Launch off massive ramps, flip through the air, dodge hazards, and master precision landings. Unlock powerful vehicles, push your limits, and dominate increasingly chaotic challenges packed with nonstop action. Web Dev https://www.coolcrazygames.com/
instructions: A and D keys or Arrow keys left and right
